chain.thought: Explanation: The table shows a three-year cycle: Year 1 covers 2013, 2016, 2019, 2022; Year 2 covers 2014, 2017, 2020, 2023; Year 3 covers 2015, 2018, 2021, 2024. This indicates the same content recurs every 3 years.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The table groups years into three repeating categories: Year 1 (e.g., 2013, 2016, 2019, 2022), Year 2 (e.g., 2014, 2017, 2020, 2023), and Year 3 (e.g., 2015, 2018, 2021, 2024). This indicates a triennial cycle where the same content recurs every 3 years. Therefore, it takes 3 years to repeat the same content.
